title: Simplify mise task command definitions
description:
## Why
The repository's mise tasks use verbose shell wrappers for shell linting, SBOM generation, commit checks, and release verification.

## What needs to be done
- replace wrapper shell logic with simpler direct task commands where equivalent
- verify the updated tasks still run through mise
- commit and push the task updates

title: Rewrite project README
description: Refresh the repository README so it better explains the devcontainer image, local development workflow, release flow, and published image verification.
acceptance_criteria: README clearly describes image contents, local mise tasks, release flow, and image verification.
